description_long: This is a portable, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a bright red body and a black base, commonly used for emergency fire suppression in urban environments. The front features a large, blue and white label with detailed instructions and pictograms, as well as the word 'Powder' indicating its dry chemical contents. A black hose is attached to the side, looping from the top valve assembly down to the base, and is secured with a clip. The top of the extinguisher has a gray valve assembly with a red lever handle and a visible safety pin. The surface is smooth and glossy, with clear, high-contrast labeling for visibility. This type of extinguisher is typically found mounted on walls in public buildings, garages, or near exits for quick access during emergencies.
description: A red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black base, blue and white instructional label, and a black hose attached to the side. It features a red lever handle and a visible safety pin at the top.
description_view_0: The rear view shows the red cylinder, black base, and the black hose running vertically along the side, with the handle and safety pin visible at the top.
description_view_1: The front view displays the large blue and white label with instructions, the red lever handle, and the black hose attached to the side.
description_view_2: The side-rear view highlights the curvature of the cylinder, the edge of the label, and the top handle with the safety pin.
description_view_3: The side view shows the full length of the black hose, the red lever handle, and the smooth, unmarked rear surface of the extinguisher.
attribute_label_or_signage: Large blue and white label with text and pictograms on the front of the cylinder.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: Black hose attached to the side, medium length, secured with a clip, and extending from the top valve to the base.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: Red safety pin visible at the top near the handle.
